base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_skele_dragon_body — a character (playable) from 1986 castlevania. Skele-dragon — segmented snake-style body, multiple segments follow head. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Skele-dragon — segmented snake-style body, multiple segments follow head; 4-frame wave motion for procedural body. Levels 4-5
